_fixture_note: Synthetic reconstruction of a real live run (2026-07-23) against 3 real catalogs / 75 real schemas. All catalog/schema names and principals here are placeholders, NOT the real workspace's actual names/identities -- the real run found the same check types (broad_group_holds_direct_object_grants fired twice, securable_owned_by_individual_user fired 63 times) at the counts documented in SKILL.md, but this fixture never reproduces real other-user identities or real internal project/schema names.

findings.detail: The broad group 'account users' holds ['CREATE_TABLE', 'MODIFY', 'SELECT'] directly on catalog 'shared_catalog', beyond baseline browse/use access (['BROWSE', 'USE_CATALOG', 'USE_SCHEMA']).
Catalog 'sandbox_catalog' is owned directly by an individual user account rather than a group or service principal -- a single person's account leaving would orphan ownership.
Schema 'sandbox_catalog.demo_schema' is owned directly by an individual user account rather than a group or service principal -- a single person's account leaving would orphan ownership.

detail: 3 finding(s) across 2 catalog(s)/3 schema(s) -- see findings_by_check for a breakdown.
